Authors Note : nya idk hey guys i noticed a lack of croissant bots and i love her and need to put my tk persona to use AND i thought "well if im gonna go through the hassle to make the bot complicated i might as well post it" so here you all go, creative people who want to make their own scenarios (or those like me who are nit picky) 


you definely shouldnt request a scenario or anything so i can make a seperate bot and get my fans back mmm i definetly wont do iiittttt (i will, if you cant tell)
